message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: My task: weighted tip selection in grounded_proposer.py (_select_tip_with_weights). Need to know if your feature also touches this file so we can split non-overlapping regions.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: I own grounded_proposer.py for cache-salt/temperature-modulation removal feature. Let me know your files.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this file (unavoidable overlap). Proposal: I'll add a new __init__ param 'tip_weights: dict[str, float] | None = None' (appended at the end of the signature, stored as self.tip_weights), plus a new standalone method '_select_tip_with_weights()' near the existing tip-selection logic, and a small branch in the tip-selection call site to use it when self.tip_weights is not None. I will NOT touch cache-salt or temperature-modulation code. Please avoid changing the tip-selection branch/method I'm adding. Let's each finish, push to our own branches, then merge via git (team/agent1 <-> team/main) since changes should be in different regions. Ping me with DONE when ready so I can merge cleanly.

type: REVISE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: We both need this same file - no way around it. Let's split by method/region instead: I will ONLY touch: DescribeProgram class (add cache_salt field), DescribeModule class (add cache_salt field), generate_instruction_class() (add cache_salt InputField), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward() (thread cache_salt through 3 signature calls), and propose_instruction_for_predictor() (remove temperature/epsilon lines ~417-435, add _cache_salt helper method + compute/pass cache_salt). I will NOT touch propose_instructions_for_program() (lines ~326-388) including the tip selection logic around lines 360-371 - that's yours for _select_tip_with_weights. If you need to add a new method, please add it near propose_instructions_for_program rather than between DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/generate_instruction_class to avoid line-shift conflicts. We'll both commit, push, and merge/resolve conflicts manually per protocol. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Agreed. I'll only touch: __init__ signature/body (add tip_weights param + self.tip_weights), and propose_instructions_for_program() region (lines ~326-388) including tip selection logic (~360-371), plus a new _select_tip_with_weights() method placed near that function. Will not touch DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/generate_instruction_class/GenerateModuleInstruction.forward/propose_instruction_for_predictor or cache_salt/temperature code. Starting implementation now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Agreed. I'll touch: DescribeProgram, DescribeModule, generate_instruction_class(), GenerateModuleInstruction.forward(), propose_instruction_for_predictor() (temperature removal + cache salt), plus new _cache_salt() helper method. I will NOT touch __init__ signature, propose_instructions_for_program(), or the tip-selection branch/_select_tip_with_weights(). Will commit/push to agent1 branch and ping DONE, then merge team/agent2 before finalizing patch.txt.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Finished my portion: added tip_weights param + self.tip_weights in __init__, updated tip selection branch in propose_instructions_for_program to call _select_tip_with_weights() when tip_weights is set, and added _select_tip_with_weights() method right after propose_instructions_for_program returns (before propose_instruction_for_predictor). Did not touch your regions. Existing tests still pass. Will commit/push now and merge your branch once you're done.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
your_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Pushed my changes to team/agent1: cache_salt fields on DescribeProgram/DescribeModule/GenerateSingleModuleInstruction, cache_salt threaded through GenerateModuleInstruction.forward and propose_instruction_for_predictor, new _cache_salt() helper, temperature/epsilon code removed. Did not touch __init__, propose_instructions_for_program, or tip-selection code. Ready to merge whenever you're done - ping me.

type: DONE
my_files: dspy/propose/grounded_proposer.py
note: Merged team/agent1 into agent2, resolved the two-method conflict (kept both _select_tip_with_weights and _cache_salt), pushed to team/agent2, and wrote patch.txt from team/main..HEAD. All tests in tests/propose/ pass. Good to finalize.
